class.description: Nearness Diagram (ND) reactive local controller. Scans the costmap into a per-sector obstacle-nearness diagram, selects a navigable gap toward the goal, and applies a safety deflection that steers away from close obstacles (corridor centring). A different reactive paradigm from VFH+. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Stops when no plan is set or the goal is reached.
